formdata.value: Monarch gives you all the tools to plan, track, and improve your financial life.
Answer questions about your health, lifestyle, and wellness goals.
Shop essentials, explore wellness, personalize vitamins for daily balance, and build healthier habits for lasting vitality.
We're on a mission for health - empowering you to become an active participant in your own wellbeing.
We're here to simplify your wellness routine with effective, evidence-backed formulas you can trust.
Connect with certified health professionals for trusted, personalized advice tailored to your unique wellness needs.
Within minutes you will receive a personalized vitamin plan completely tailored to you\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\!
Experts recommend at least 90 days of consistent use of supplements for optimal results.
Every formula is made with rigorously tested, high-quality ingredients to ensure safety and effectiveness.
The Viteezy Scientific Committee and our R&D team put their combined expertise, research and unique ever-changing technology into creating exceptional products.
Viteezy design solutions backed by 10,000+ trials and studies.
We follow strict protocols and lab testing to ensure safe, trusted results.
Viteezy analyze user data to prove and improve solutions.
We're here for you every step of your health journey, with over 9,000 positive reviews and counting\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\!
Discover expert tips and guides to improve your daily wellbeing for a healthier tomorrow
Find clear, simple answers to common questions and understand how Health Compass supports you

When does the direct debit take place?

item.name: Admin - Header Banner Management

request.description: Create a new header banner. Text should be in English only (simple string). Translation will be available in GET APIs based on user's language preference.
Create a new header banner for mobile devices.

query.description: Search by text in any language
Filter by device type (WEB or MOBILE)

request.description: Get all header banners with pagination and filters. Response will be translated based on admin's language preference from token.

item.name: Get All Header Banners (Filtered by Device Type)

request.description: Get all header banners filtered by device type and active status.
Get a specific header banner by ID. Response will be translated based on admin's language preference from token.
Update header banner. You can update text (I18n object), deviceType, or isActive status. If setting as active, other banners for the same device type will be automatically deactivated.
Toggle the active status of a header banner. If setting as active, other banners for the same device type will be automatically deactivated.
Soft delete a header banner. The banner will be marked as deleted but not removed from the database.

item.description: Admin endpoints for managing header banners. All endpoints require Admin authentication.

item.name: Public - Header Banner

header.description: Optional - for language detection from user token

request.description: Get the active header banner for web devices. If user is authenticated, response will be translated based on user's language preference from token. Otherwise, defaults to English.

header.description: Optional - for language detection from user token

request.description: Get the active header banner for mobile devices. If user is authenticated, response will be translated based on user's language preference from token. Otherwise, defaults to English.
Get the active header banner without authentication. Response will be in English (default language).

item.description: Public endpoints for retrieving active header banners. Authentication is optional - if provided, response will be translated based on user's language preference.
